productDisplayName: Maxima Women White Dial Ssteel Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this SSteele watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Round stainless steel case Dial style: White dial with crystal at 12 hour mark and steel hands Strap stype: Shaped steel bracelet strap with butterfly clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 22 mm Case thickness: 7 mm
